text:
There was an old tree. It had lived many lives. Its bark had faded. Its branches had lost their strength. It lived deep in the forest. Nobody knew it. One day, it heard a girl cry.

The girl ran toward the tree. The tree reached out its branch.

The girl sat under the branch. She ate apple slices. She sang folk songs. Time passed.

The branch broke. The girl fell.

The tree cared.

She went to school.

The stars watched.

She was okay. They liked stars.

The tree cared a lot.

Now it has many branches.

They fill nights. They fill dreams.

That's its life. That's its treasure.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
